addressed_findings.finding: Startup legacy backfill could mutate sessionKey/currentSessionId inside normalizeTabLifecycleMetadata before initialize captured the changed flag, causing metadata not to be saved.
addressed_findings.resolution: Moved the startup backfill mutation out of normalizeTabLifecycleMetadata so initialize records tabMetadataChanged and saves immediately.

summary: No remaining findings. Reviewed stable sessionKey/currentSessionId binding, stale sessionId rejection, alias list/search/set behavior, WorkspaceTab alias persistence, startup backfill, restart/orphan preservation, and type/build compatibility.
